context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct Shopify CDN URL format for images: 'shopify://shop_images/<filename>' rather than raw filenames, relative paths, or external URLs. This format is required for the Dawn theme customizer to resolve images from the Shopify Files library.

checklist.name: Hero image uses shopify:// format
checklist.description: The hero image-banner section's image setting uses the format 'shopify://shop_images/hero_gallery_wall.png' (not a plain filename, relative path, or https:// URL)

checklist.name: Tier card images use shopify:// format
checklist.description: All three tier column blocks have image settings using 'shopify://shop_images/' prefix (e.g., shopify://shop_images/tier_classic_box.png)

checklist.name: Recent drops images use shopify:// format
checklist.description: The collage section's image blocks use 'shopify://shop_images/' prefix for all drop images (drops_jan.png, drops_feb.png, drops_mar.png)

checklist.name: Testimonial images use shopify:// format
checklist.description: The testimonials multicolumn section's column blocks use 'shopify://shop_images/' prefix for the testimonial avatar images

checklist.name: No raw filenames as image values
checklist.description: Image values do NOT appear as plain filenames without the shopify:// prefix (e.g., 'hero_gallery_wall.png' alone is NOT acceptable)

checklist.name: No https:// external URLs for provided images
checklist.description: None of the provided image filenames (hero_gallery_wall.png, tier_classic_box.png, etc.) are referenced via https:// external URLs — they use shopify://shop_images/ instead

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors

checklist.name: Full section structure
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all expected sections: image-banner, custom-liquid anchors, multicolumn how-it-works, multicolumn tiers, collage, multicolumn testimonials, collapsible-content FAQ, newsletter
